description: Validates the static analysis pass, ensuring nodes are correctly flagged for potential hoisting by the emitter.

assertNodes.description: A node with no dynamic children or attributes should be marked as static.
A child of a static node with no dynamic features should also be static.
A node containing an interpolation is not static.
A node containing a dynamic child is not static.
A static node that is a sibling of a dynamic node should remain static.
